# ICAP 2026 — Toward an AI-assisted Comprehensive Meta-analysis of the Organizational Commitment Literature

Public, shareable copy of the conference slides.

- **View online:** https://dstanley4.github.io/icap2026/ (short link: https://tinyurl.com/icap2026-commitment)
- **Download:** [deck.pdf](deck.pdf)

Authors: John P. Meyer, David J. Stanley, Jose A. Espinoza, Amir Mehr. ICAP 2026.

The web view is a single-column scroll gallery; the four animated figures play inline.
`deck.pdf` is a faithful static copy of the full deck as presented.
